sections.title: When to use this
sections.summary: Use when changing the repo-local knowledge pack, agent instructions, or the local-first workflow around `.datalox/`.

sections.title: Steps
sections.summary: Preserve approved pack files, keep native skills intact, use `.datalox/working/` for immediate-use updates, and avoid server changes unless needed.

sections.title: Judgment patterns
sections.summary: If the right knowledge is found but still hard to use, improve the guidance surface before adding more configuration.

sections.title: Escalation rules
sections.summary: Escalate when changes cross the portable pack boundary and the server/runtime boundary.

patterns.signal: The right skill and docs are found, but the user still has to inspect raw file paths to understand what to do.
patterns.interpretation: This is a guidance-surface problem, not a retrieval problem.
patterns.recommendedAction: Improve the resolved output so it exposes summaries, patterns, and escalation rules directly.

patterns.signal: A new behavior is useful immediately but not yet stable enough to approve.
patterns.interpretation: This belongs in the working layer first.
patterns.recommendedAction: Write it to `.datalox/working/` and use it immediately without mutating approved knowledge.

patterns.signal: A repo-local workflow starts overriding an agent platform's own built-in skills or tools.
patterns.interpretation: The boundary is wrong; Datalox is becoming invasive.
patterns.recommendedAction: Keep Datalox additive and preserve the agent's native/global skill stack.

escalationRules.condition: A change affects both the portable pack contract and the server/runtime contract.
escalationRules.action: Escalate for explicit review before merging.
